ae45d95d78a404cfbd3b4bd2c06c4941.human_readable_prompt:
Build a luxury real estate landing page using the following exact design system. The business name is 'Real Estate Website'. Use Playfair Display for all headings and Inter for all body text. Primary brand color is #ecc022 (warm gold), secondary is #000000 (black), with a white/off-white (#ffffff / #f5f5f0) background throughout light-mode sections.

**SECTION 1 – HERO IMAGE COLLAGE:** Full-width, full-bleed two-panel split photography layout at the very top. Left panel shows an interior luxury kitchen photo, right panel shows an exterior estate/landscape photo. No text overlay. Height approximately 420–480px. Images are edge-to-edge with no padding.

**SECTION 2 – AGENT BIO:** White background, centered layout, max-width 900px, 80px vertical padding. Left side: circular or square cropped agent headshot (~180px). Right side: Large Playfair Display heading 'Meet [Agent Name]' (~38px, black), below it a small uppercase Inter label 'BROKER | OWNER' in #ecc022 or dark gray, followed by 2–3 sentences of body copy in Inter 15px #555555. Below the text: small social media icon row (square icon buttons, ~28px, outlined in light gray), and a right-aligned text link '→ LEARN MORE' in Inter uppercase, gold color #ecc022.

**SECTION 3 – SERVICE CARDS (3-COLUMN):** Full-width section, no background padding, three equal-width image cards side by side. Each card is a full-bleed photography background with a dark gradient overlay at the bottom. Overlay text is white, Playfair Display ~22px, centered at bottom of card. Cards represent: 'Home Search', 'Home Valuation', 'Contact Us'. Cards are approximately 380px tall. Hover state should slightly brighten or scale image.

**SECTION 4 – TESTIMONIALS SLIDER:** Full-width section, approximately 420px tall. Background is a luxury interior photo with a dark semi-transparent overlay (~70% black). Left side shows a small brand logo mark centered. Right side shows a large pull-quote in Inter italic white, ~16px, with attribution below in small Inter regular. Top-left has a small pill badge 'TESTIMONIALS' in white with gold border. Bottom-right has a 'VIEW ALL' outlined white button. Navigation arrows (circular outline) at bottom-left for carousel. Carousel dot indicators present.

**SECTION 5 – PAST TRANSACTIONS:** White background section, 80px vertical padding. Section heading 'Past Transactions' in Playfair Display ~34px centered black. Below: 3-column grid of property listing cards. Each card has: a full-width property photo (~220px tall) with a 'SOLD' badge overlay in #ecc022 top-left corner, below the image: 'Price Upon Request' in Inter semi-bold ~15px black, address in Inter regular ~13px gray, bed/bath/sqft stats in Inter small ~12px gray. Below the grid: left-side carousel arrows (circle outline, black) and right-side 'VIEW ALL' text link button with gold underline.

**SECTION 6 – EMAIL OPT-IN CTA BAND:** Dark background section (#111111 or #1a1a1a), 60px vertical padding, centered content max-width 700px. Large heading in Playfair Display ~32px white: 'Receive Exclusive Listings in Your Inbox'. Subheading in Inter regular ~14px light gray. Below: inline form row with two text inputs (Name, Email) side by side and a 'SUBMIT' button in #ecc022 background, black text, Inter medium, ~44px height, no border-radius or slight 2px radius. Below form: small checkbox with Inter ~11px gray disclaimer text.

**SECTION 7 – WORK WITH US CTA:** Full-width section, ~500px tall, full-bleed luxury outdoor living space photography with dark overlay. Centered content: heading 'Work With Us' in Playfair Display ~40px white. Below: 2 lines of Inter regular ~14px white body copy. Below: outlined pill button 'CONTACT US' in white border and white text, ~48px height, 24px horizontal padding, hover fills white with black text.

**SECTION 8 – FOOTER:** Light cream/white background (#f9f8f4), 60px vertical padding. Top row: brand logo mark in #ecc022 top-left. Below logo: company name in Inter bold ~14px, phone, email in Inter regular ~13px gray. Middle columns: 'Location' with city/state text, and a horizontal nav link row (Home, Meet the Team, Portfolio, Testimonials, Contact Us) in Inter ~12px gray. Far right: social media icons row (circular, ~30px). Bottom row: full-width divider line, then two-column: left side legal/compliance text in Inter ~10px gray (license info, brokerage info), right side Equal Housing logo. Very bottom bar: 'Powered by Luxury Presence' left, 'Copyright © 2024 | Privacy Policy' right, both in Inter ~11px gray.

**GLOBAL DESIGN RULES:** Use 8px base spacing unit. Section max-width 1140px centered. All buttons use Inter medium 500. Gold (#ecc022) used only for accents, badges, active states, and primary CTA backgrounds — never overused. Black (#000000) for all primary text. Maintain high-contrast text on all dark/image backgrounds. Image cards use CSS object-fit: cover. Smooth scroll behavior. Mobile-responsive with single-column stacking below 768px breakpoint.

Tight letter-spacing on headlines, generous line-height on body. All text center-aligned in hero sections, left-aligned in grid cards.

878a8c78c1adc60eea191f870c19176a.human_readable_prompt:
Build a full-page premium dark-mode website for 'Mega Truncation Test Corp' following Apple's clean whitespace and premium typography design language. The entire color system is monochromatic: use #000000 as both primary and secondary color, with white (#FFFFFF) as the dominant background for light sections and pure black (#000000) for dark hero sections. Do not introduce any third accent colors unless used for product imagery only.

**Navigation:** Implement a sticky top navigation bar, 44px tall, with a subtle 1px bottom border in rgba(0,0,0,0.1). Logo/brand name 'Mega Truncation Test Corp' left-aligned (truncate gracefully). Center navigation links in regular weight ~14px. Right side: search icon, utility icons. Above the nav, place a full-width dismissible announcement banner in #F5F5F7 background with 11px centered text and a close (×) button on the right.

**Hero Section:** Full-width section, white background, centered content. Large display headline ~52px bold black, tight letter-spacing (-0.5px). Subtitle text ~19px regular weight, #6E6E73 gray. Below text: two pill-shaped CTA buttons side by side — primary filled black with white text, secondary transparent with black text and black border. Both buttons ~14px, ~28px height, ~16px horizontal padding, border-radius 980px. Hero product image centered below buttons, oversized, no border, no shadow.

**Product Hero Sections:** Alternate between dark (#000000 or #1D1D1F) and light (#F5F5F7 or white) full-bleed backgrounds. Each section: centered headline ~40–48px bold, subtitle ~19px, dual pill buttons, large product image. Vertical padding 80px top and bottom.

**2-Column Product Grid:** Two equal-width cards side by side with ~3px gap, each with rounded corners (18px border-radius). Cards have distinct background fills (light gray #F5F5F7, soft gradient, or color-tinted). Internal padding 40px. Card content: small brand/product label ~12px uppercase tracking, headline ~28px bold, subtext ~14px #6E6E73, pill CTA buttons, product image bottom-anchored or centered. Cards are flush to viewport edges on mobile, max combined width 1200px on desktop.

**Entertainment / Media Section:** Full-width dark (#000000) section with large centered white headline ~40px bold. Below: full-bleed horizontal carousel of streaming content cards with cinematic imagery, overlay text, and 'Stream now' pill buttons in white. Carousel has dot pagination indicators.

**Horizontal Scroll Media Row:** Below main carousel, a horizontal scrolling row of smaller square media cards (~200px wide), each with imagery, title, and a small action button. Cards have 12px border-radius.

**Footer:** Multi-column link list footer on #F5F5F7 background. 5–6 columns of categorized links, each column with a bold 12px uppercase heading and 12px regular-weight links in #424245. 40px padding top and bottom. Below footer: single-row legal bar with copyright text left and policy links right, all in 11px #6E6E73.

**Typography System:** Use system-ui or SF Pro-equivalent. Display: 52px / bold / -0.5px tracking. Section headline: 40px / semibold. Card headline: 28px / semibold. Body/subtitle: 17–19px / regular. Small label: 12px / regular. Legal: 11px / regular. Line-height: 1.1 for headlines, 1.5 for body.

**Spacing Rhythm:** 8px base grid. Section vertical padding: 80–100px. Card padding: 40px. Button padding: 8px 18px. Gap between grid cards: 2–4px. Max content width: 1200px centered with auto horizontal margins.

**Overall Aesthetic:** No decorative elements, no gradients on UI chrome, no drop shadows on containers. Let whitespace and typography do all the work. Product imagery is the only visual decoration. Every element should feel intentional, restrained, and premium.

5b79dd9100b91ec499ee9f3a8a3c636d.human_readable_prompt:
Build a full-page dark-mode enterprise SaaS website for 'Mega Truncation Test Corp' inspired by Stripe's sophisticated gradient system and smooth animation language. All primary and secondary brand colors are #000000 (pure black), used as the foundational dark background. Typography is unspecified so use a clean system sans-serif stack (Inter or system-ui) throughout.

GLOBAL FOUNDATION: Set the page background to #000000. Overlay sections with Stripe-style multi-stop radial and linear gradients that transition through deep indigo (#635BFF range), electric blue (#0A2FFF range), cyan (#00D4FF range), and soft violet (#9B59B6 range) — these gradients should feel luminous against the black base, never flat. All text defaults to #FFFFFF or near-white (#F0F0F0) for body copy.

NAVIGATION: Sticky top bar, full-width, ~64px height, black background with subtle bottom border (rgba white, 10% opacity). Left: 'Mega Truncation Test Corp' wordmark in white, bold. Center: horizontal nav links (Products, Solutions, Developers, Resources, Pricing) in ~14px medium weight, white with hover underline animation. Right: 'Sign in' ghost link + 'Start now' pill CTA button with gradient fill (indigo to blue), white text, 6px border-radius, smooth hover scale transform.

HERO SECTION: Full-width, min-height 600px. Background: animated gradient mesh — deep black base with flowing indigo/violet/blue radial gradients that subtly shift (CSS animation or canvas). Centered content column (~900px max-width). Large display headline: 'Financial infrastructure to grow your revenue' at 64-72px, font-weight 800, white, tight letter-spacing (-0.02em), line-height 1.1. Subheadline at 20px, weight 400, rgba(255,255,255,0.75), max-width 600px, centered. Two CTA buttons side by side: primary pill (gradient indigo→blue, white text) and secondary ghost pill (white border, white text). Below headline: floating UI mockup cards showing payment dashboards — use drop-shadow(0 20px 60px rgba(99,91,255,0.4)) for glow effect, slight rotation transforms, animate in on load with translateY + opacity.

FEATURE GRID SECTION: White or very light gray (#F8F8F8) background for contrast break. 3-column grid of feature cards, each ~300px wide, 24px gap. Cards: white background, 12px border-radius, 24px padding, subtle box-shadow. Icon at top (32px, brand gradient colored), bold heading (~18px), body text (~14px, #666666). Smooth hover: translateY(-4px) + shadow intensify.

PRODUCT DEMO CARDS: Dark section (#0A0A0A). Alternating left-right layout rows. Each row: 50% text content + 50% UI screenshot card. Cards have glassmorphism treatment: background rgba(255,255,255,0.05), border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1), backdrop-filter blur(20px), border-radius 16px. Text side: small pill badge (gradient background, white text, 4px radius), large heading 36px white bold, body 16px rgba(255,255,255,0.7), optional CTA link with arrow.

GRADIENT BANNER SECTION: Full-width, ~300px height. Background: bold diagonal gradient from deep purple (#4B0082) through electric blue (#0066FF) to cyan (#00CCFF). Centered white text headline ~40px bold. Decorative: floating portrait images with circular clip-path, drop shadows.

STATS BAR: Dark background. 4-column flex row, centered. Each stat: large number (~56px, white, weight 800) + descriptor label (~14px, rgba white 60%). Thin vertical dividers between columns. Subtle entrance animation: count-up on scroll.

SOCIAL PROOF / LOGOS: Light section. Heading centered. Horizontal scrolling or grid of partner/customer logos in grayscale, hover reveals color. Below: 2-column article-style feature rows with thumbnail images (16:9, border-radius 8px), headline, excerpt, and 'Read more' link.

COLORFUL PARTNER CARDS GRID: Dark section. 4-column grid of brand cards (~200px square). Each card has unique vivid background (one purple, one teal, one yellow, one dark), centered logo/icon, company name. Border-radius 16px. Hover: scale(1.04) with glow shadow matching card color.

DEVELOPER SECTION: Black background. Left: code snippet block with syntax highlighting (dark terminal style, monospace font, colored tokens), copy button. Right: feature list with checkmark icons, heading, body text. Gradient accent line on left border of code block.

INFRASTRUCTURE SECTION: Deep dark background with animated wave/mesh SVG. Large centered heading. Below: 3-column icon+text feature cards. Background cards use glassmorphism. Animated gradient wave at bottom of section.

STATS COUNTERS: Full-width dark section. 3 large stats (500M+, 10K+, $10B+) in a centered flex row. Numbers at 64px white bold, labels below at 16px muted white.

NEWS SECTION: Light background. Grid of editorial cards (image top, category tag, headline, date). Cards with hover lift.

FOOTER: Black background, 80px top padding. Top: logo + tagline. Below: 5-6 column mega-menu grid with category headings (white, 12px uppercase, letter-spacing 0.1em) and link lists (rgba white 60%, 14px, hover white). Bottom bar: copyright, legal links, social icons. All separated by 1px rgba white 10% borders.

ANIMATIONS: All sections use Intersection Observer scroll-triggered fade-in (opacity 0→1, translateY 20px→0, duration 0.6s ease-out). Gradient backgrounds use slow CSS keyframe animation (background-position shift over 8s infinite). Buttons use transform scale(1.02) on hover with 0.2s ease transition. Cards use box-shadow intensification on hover.

0f21eac8bcdbe7359b53145c0ac55ce3.layout: Full-width sticky navigation bar at top, centered pill-shaped multi-field search bar below nav, horizontal category tab filter row, followed by a 6-column responsive content grid for destination/listing cards. Content is left-aligned with generous outer padding.
0f21eac8bcdbe7359b53145c0ac55ce3.typography: Two-tier text hierarchy within cards: bold location/title text (~15px, semibold) on top line, lighter subdued descriptor text (~13px, regular weight) on second line. Section heading ('Inspiration for future getaways') is ~24px bold. Tab labels are ~14px medium weight. All fonts default to system sans-serif stack per N/A override.

Pill-shaped segmented search bar with labeled input fields and accent-colored circular search button

6-column destination link grid with bold title + subdued subtitle per cell
Expandable 'Show more' toggle with chevron icon

Category tabs have ~16px bottom border offset, ~24px gap between tabs. Grid uses ~32px row gap and ~24px column gap. Section heading has ~32px top margin and ~16px bottom margin before tabs. Outer page padding ~40px left/right.
0f21eac8bcdbe7359b53145c0ac55ce3.visualHierarchy: Brand logo anchors top-left. Search bar is the primary interactive focal point centered below nav. Category tabs direct content filtering. Grid content is scannable via bold city names with muted rental type subtitles. 'Show more' is de-emphasized at grid end. Hierarchy is driven by size contrast and weight contrast rather than color contrast given monochrome override.
0f21eac8bcdbe7359b53145c0ac55ce3.human_readable_prompt:
Build a dark-mode website for 'Mega Truncation Test Corp' using Airbnb's friendly card layout and high-quality image placement as the structural reference. Apply a fully black color scheme (#000000 primary, #000000 secondary) throughout. Use system sans-serif fonts for all text since no specific font is specified.

STRUCTURE FROM TOP TO BOTTOM:

1. STICKY NAVIGATION BAR: Full-width, ~64px tall, dark background (#000000). Left side: brand logo (icon + 'Mega Truncation Test Corp' wordmark, truncated gracefully if needed). Center: horizontal nav links ('Homes', 'Experiences', 'Services') with subtle active state indicator (e.g., underline or bold). Right side: 'Become a host' text link, a globe/language icon button, and a pill-shaped hamburger menu button with border. All text in light/white tones for dark mode contrast.

2. SEARCH BAR SECTION: Centered pill-shaped search container, ~580px wide, ~64px tall, with a light border and subtle shadow. Divided into 3 labeled input segments separated by thin vertical dividers: 'Where' (text input, placeholder 'Search destinations'), 'When' (date picker trigger, placeholder 'Add dates'), 'Who' (guest counter, placeholder 'Add guests'). Far right of pill: a circular accent-colored search button (~44px diameter) with a white magnifying glass icon. In dark mode, the pill background should be dark gray (#111111 or #1a1a1a) with white label text and placeholder text in muted gray.

3. CATEGORY FILTER TABS: Left-aligned horizontal tab row below search bar, ~48px top margin. Tabs: 'Popular', 'Arts & culture', 'Beach', 'Mountains', 'Outdoors', 'Things to do'. Active tab has a 2px bottom border underline in white or accent color. Tab text is ~14px, medium weight. Inactive tabs are muted gray. Tabs have ~24px horizontal spacing between them.

4. SECTION HEADING: Left-aligned heading text 'Inspiration for future getaways' (or equivalent brand copy), ~24px, bold/semibold, white text. ~32px top margin above heading.

5. DESTINATION CONTENT GRID: A 6-column CSS grid layout (responsive: collapse to 4 cols on tablet, 2 cols on mobile). Each grid cell contains: Line 1 — location/item name in ~15px semibold white text. Line 2 — descriptor/category in ~13px regular muted gray text (e.g., 'Apartment rentals'). No card borders or backgrounds — cells rely purely on whitespace for visual separation. Grid gap: ~32px vertical, ~24px horizontal. Outer padding: ~40px left/right. Render approximately 18 cells across 3 rows of 6.

6. SHOW MORE ROW: At the bottom of the grid, right-aligned 'Show more' text link (~14px, medium weight, white) with a downward chevron icon inline. Clicking expands additional grid rows.

DESIGN PRINCIPLES TO MAINTAIN:
- Friendly, approachable feel via generous whitespace and clean typographic hierarchy
- High-quality image placement: if images are added to cards, use 4:3 or 1:1 aspect ratio containers with rounded corners (~12px border-radius), object-fit cover, and subtle hover scale transform (scale 1.03, transition 0.3s ease)
- Dark mode throughout: backgrounds #000000 or #0a0a0a, text white (#ffffff) and muted (#888888)
- No harsh borders; use shadow and spacing to define regions
- Pill and rounded-corner UI elements for search bar and buttons
- Truncate long business name gracefully in nav using CSS text-overflow ellipsis with max-width constraint
- Hover states on grid cells: underline on title text, cursor pointer
- Fully responsive layout collapsing gracefully at 768px and 480px breakpoints

d0b3b7a1c00ca902101499abdf80e719.human_readable_prompt:
Build a luxury real estate landing page for 'Real Estate' using the following design system. The page uses a light theme overall with strategic full-bleed dark/image sections for contrast. Primary brand color is gold #cda20a, secondary is black #000000, backgrounds are white #ffffff. Headings use Playfair Display (serif), body text uses Inter (sans-serif).

**HERO SECTION:** Full-width, full-bleed background photograph of a city skyline or landmark property at dusk/golden hour. Centered overlay content: large brand logo in Playfair Display at ~64px bold, gold (#cda20a) color with a horizontal decorative rule beneath it. Below the logo, a short italic tagline in Inter ~16px white. The hero should be approximately 500-600px tall. No navigation bar visible over hero — keep it clean.

**AGENT BIO SECTION:** White background, ~100px vertical padding. Two-column layout: left column contains a professional portrait photo (roughly 280x320px, slightly rounded or natural crop). Right column contains: a small uppercase Inter label 'BROKER | OWNER' in gold tracking ~2px, a large Playfair Display H2 heading 'Meet [Agent Name]' at ~40px, followed by 3-4 lines of Inter body text at 15px in #333333 describing expertise. Below the text, a row of small social media icon buttons (circular outline style in gold), and a 'Learn More' text link with a gold arrow icon. Below the photo on the left, a small pill-shaped button with outline style in gold labeled 'INSTAGRAM →'.

**SERVICES GRID SECTION:** Full-width, 3-column grid with no gaps or minimal 4px gaps. Each column is a tall image card (~280px height) with a full-bleed property/interior photograph. At the bottom of each card, a semi-transparent dark overlay bar with white Playfair Display text label: 'Home Search', 'Home Valuation', 'Contact Us'. Cards are clickable. No border radius.

**TESTIMONIALS SECTION:** Full-bleed section (~400px tall) with a background property interior photograph. A dark semi-transparent overlay (#000000 at 55% opacity) covers the image. Left side: brand logo in gold (small, ~80px wide). Center-right: a large open-quote icon in gold, followed by testimonial body text in Inter italic ~15px white, 3-4 lines. Below: attribution name in Inter bold white ~13px with a dash prefix. Bottom right: a small outlined white button 'VIEW ALL'. Section label 'Testimonials' in Playfair Display ~13px gold uppercase at top center.

**PAST TRANSACTIONS SECTION:** White background, ~80px vertical padding. Centered Playfair Display H2 'Past Transactions' ~36px black. Below: a horizontal carousel of property listing cards, showing 3 cards at a time. Each card: property photo (~180px tall), a 'SOLD' badge in gold top-right corner, below photo: 'Price Upon Request' in Playfair Display ~16px bold, address in Inter ~12px gray, property specs (bed/bath/sqft) in Inter ~11px gray. Below carousel: left/right arrow navigation buttons (circular outline, gold) on left, and a 'VIEW ALL' outlined gold button on right.

**EMAIL OPT-IN BANNER:** Dark background section (#111111 or #000000), ~160px tall, centered content. Playfair Display H2 ~32px white: 'Receive Exclusive Listings in Your Inbox'. Subtext in Inter ~14px gray. Below: inline form with two text inputs (Email, Email confirm) styled with white border-bottom only (minimal), and a gold filled submit button 'SUBMIT' in Inter bold uppercase. Below form: small Inter ~11px gray disclaimer/consent text.

**WORK WITH US CTA SECTION:** Full-bleed background photograph of a luxury outdoor living space. Dark overlay at ~60% opacity. Centered content: Playfair Display H2 ~40px white 'Work With Us'. Below: 2-3 lines of Inter ~14px white body text. Below: a gold outlined pill button 'CONTACT US' in white/gold text, ~48px tall, ~160px wide, with hover fill gold.

**FOOTER:** White background, ~80px top padding. Top row: brand logo in gold Playfair Display left-aligned. Below logo: contact phone, email in Inter ~13px gray. Three columns of footer nav links in Inter ~13px: Home, Meet the Team, Portfolio, Testimonials, Contact Us. A 'Location' column with city/state. Right side: social media icon row (circular gold outline icons). Bottom row: full-width thin #e0e0e0 divider, then copyright text in Inter ~11px gray left, Privacy Policy link right. Equal Housing logo bottom left. 'Powered by Luxury Presence' in Inter ~11px gray bottom left.

**GLOBAL STYLES:** All section transitions are clean cuts (no diagonal or curved dividers). Gold (#cda20a) is used exclusively for: logo, button fills/outlines, accent lines, badge backgrounds, icon colors. Black (#000000) for headings and dark overlays. White (#ffffff) for backgrounds and reversed text. Inter body text default color #444444. All buttons have ~4px border-radius or fully pill-shaped. Hover states: gold buttons darken to #b8900a. Images use object-fit: cover. Page max-width for content containers: 1200px centered with auto margins. Mobile responsive with single-column stacking.

74b114774ef1144013d38bb2d42422bf.human_readable_prompt:
Build a luxury real estate landing page using the following complete design specification. The business name is 'Real Estate'. Use Playfair Display for all headings and Inter for all body text. Primary accent color is #cda20a (gold), background base is white/#f5f0e8 warm off-white for light sections, and #000000 for dark sections and footer. The page is a single-column full-width landing page with a max-width container of 1200px centered.

**NAVIGATION:** Sticky top nav bar, white background, logo on the left in bold Inter or Playfair Display, navigation links centered or right-aligned in Inter 14px, with a gold CTA button (Login/Contact) on the far right. Height ~64px, subtle bottom border.

**HERO SECTION:** Full-bleed, 100vh or ~600px tall, dark background (#000000 or very dark navy overlay on a luxury property photograph). Large Playfair Display headline 'Find Your Perfect Home' in white, 56–64px, bold, left-aligned within container. Subtitle in Inter 16px light gray below. A circular compass/badge UI element decorates the hero. Thumbnail strip of 3 small property preview images sits at the bottom of the hero. Pagination dots or arrows for carousel.

**YOUR PERFECT PLACE AWAITS SECTION:** White/off-white background. Centered Playfair Display H2 ~36px 'Your Perfect Place Awaits', Inter body text subtitle below in gray. Below: a 3-column image grid of property photos, equal height ~220px, with slight border-radius (4–6px). Section padding 80px top/bottom.

**ABOUT US SECTION:** Two-column split layout. Left: large lifestyle photograph of real estate agents/clients. Right: small gold uppercase Inter label 'GET TO KNOW', then Playfair Display H2 'About Us', followed by Inter body paragraph in gray #555, then a gold-bordered or gold-text 'Learn More' link/button. Background warm off-white. 80px vertical padding.

**EXPERIENCE THE EXTRAORDINARY — PROPERTY LISTINGS GRID:** Light background section. Centered Playfair Display H2 with small gold uppercase pre-label 'LEADING MODULAR CONSTRUCTION'. Below: 3x2 grid of property cards. Each card: full-width property photo top, then below: small gold uppercase tag (APARTMENT/HOUSE), property address in Inter semi-bold 15px, bed/bath/sqft icons with Inter 13px values in gray, and gold price label right-aligned in Inter bold. Cards have white background, subtle box-shadow, 4–6px border-radius. Grid gap 20px. Section padding 80–100px.

**REACH OUT FOR EXPERT ASSISTANCE — CTA SECTION:** Full-width section with a dark real estate background image and dark overlay. Left side: Playfair Display H2 in white 'Reach Out For Expert Assistance', Inter subtitle in light gray, gold accent underline or decoration. Right side: floating white card (~380px wide) with form fields (Full Name, Email, Phone, Message) in Inter 14px, each field with light gray border, 8px border-radius, 12px padding. Below fields: full-width gold (#cda20a) rounded button 'Contact Us' in Inter bold black text. Card has white background, 16px border-radius, 32px padding, subtle shadow.

**OUR RECENT PROJECT — FEATURED SPLIT SECTION:** Off-white background. Left: large property photograph (~55% width). Right: small gold uppercase Inter label 'RESIDENTIAL', Playfair Display H3 address/project name, gold price in Inter bold large, then Inter body description paragraph in gray, then gold outlined or filled 'View Details' button. Section padding 80px.

**STATS BAR:** Full-width dark (#000000) horizontal strip. 4 columns equally spaced: each with a gold icon (house/parking/apartment/person), large gold number in Inter bold 48px, and white Inter label below. Examples: 3985 Square Areas, 460 Parking Slots, 385 Apartments, 45 Green Spaces.

**SEARCH YOUR PROPERTY SECTION:** Off-white/cream background. Centered Playfair Display H2 'Search Your Property', Inter subtitle. Below: full-width search bar row with 3 dropdown selectors (Location, Property Type, Type) in white with gray border, Inter 14px, and a gold (#cda20a) rounded pill button 'FIND PROPERTY' on the right in Inter bold. Section padding 80px.

**UNVEIL YOUR DESTINY — DESTINATIONS SECTION:** Off-white background. Centered Playfair Display H2 with gold uppercase pre-label 'OUR DESTINATION'. Below: 4-column grid of destination cards, each a tall image (~280px) with a dark gradient overlay and white Inter location name label at bottom. Slight border-radius 6px. Gap 16px.

**FOOTER:** Full-width dark (#000000) background. Top row: logo centered or left, then 3–4 columns: Quick Links (Inter 13px white links), Contact Us (address, phone, email in Inter 13px gray), Template links. Column headers in Inter semi-bold white 14px. Gold accent on hover states. Bottom strip: copyright in Inter 12px gray. Padding 60px top, 24px bottom. A secondary footer repeat may appear below (as seen in screenshot — duplicate footer for multi-page template preview).

**GLOBAL DESIGN TOKENS:** Border-radius: 4–8px on cards, 24–32px on pill buttons. Box shadows: subtle 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08) on cards. Transitions: 0.2s ease on hover states. Gold (#cda20a) used ONLY for: prices, CTA buttons, accent labels, icon highlights, stat numbers. All section headings in Playfair Display. All UI text, metadata, nav, forms in Inter. Warm off-white #f5f0e8 alternates with pure white for section backgrounds to create visual rhythm.

97621d2f878b0ccb5a92baec279e89a2.human_readable_prompt:
Build a full-page dark-mode SaaS website for 'Nebula AI Solutions' using the following exact design system:

**GLOBAL SETTINGS:**
Background base color: #0F0A1E (near-black deep purple-dark). Max content width: 1200px centered with auto horizontal margins. Base font: Inter. Heading font: Space Grotesk. Use CSS custom properties for all colors. Primary: #7C3AED (violet-purple). Secondary/Accent: #10B981 (emerald green). Text primary: #FFFFFF. Text secondary: #A0AEC0. Border color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08).

**NAVIGATION (Sticky):**
Fixed top nav, full-width, background: rgba(15,10,30,0.95) with backdrop-filter blur(12px). Height: 64px. Logo 'Nebula AI Solutions' on far left in Space Grotesk 600 weight, white. Center: horizontal nav links in Inter 14px, color #A0AEC0, hover color #FFFFFF. Far right: two buttons — 'Sign In' (ghost, border #7C3AED, text #7C3AED) and 'Get Started' (filled, background #7C3AED, text white, border-radius 6px, padding 8px 20px). Nav links include: Products, Solutions, Developers, Resources, Pricing.

**HERO SECTION:**
Padding: 120px top, 80px bottom. Left-aligned text layout with right-side UI mockup/dashboard preview image. H1 in Space Grotesk 700, 64px, white, line-height 1.1. Key phrase highlighted with #7C3AED color or linear-gradient(135deg, #7C3AED, #10B981) text gradient. Subheadline: Inter 18px, #A0AEC0, max-width 520px, margin-top 20px. Two CTA buttons below: primary filled #7C3AED 'Start Building', secondary outlined with white border 'View Demo'. Buttons: border-radius 8px, padding 12px 28px, font Inter 500 16px. Right column: floating UI card mockup showing dashboard interface with subtle drop shadow and slight rotation.

**PARTNER LOGO STRIP:**
Full-width section, padding 40px vertical. Background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02). Horizontal row of 6-8 grayscale partner/integration logos, opacity 0.5, evenly spaced. Label above in Inter 12px uppercase tracking-widest #A0AEC0: 'TRUSTED BY LEADING COMPANIES'.

**FEATURE SHOWCASE SECTIONS (alternating):**
Two-column split layout. Padding: 100px vertical. Odd sections: text left, visual right. Even sections: visual left, text right. Text column: small pill badge (background rgba(124,58,237,0.15), text #7C3AED, border-radius 20px, padding 4px 12px, Inter 12px 500) above H2 in Space Grotesk 600 36px white. Body text Inter 16px #A0AEC0, line-height 1.7, max-width 480px. Feature bullet list with #10B981 checkmark icons. Link 'Learn more →' in #7C3AED. Visual column: rounded-16px card with dark background #1A1030, inner UI component preview, subtle purple glow box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(124,58,237,0.2).

**STATS BANNER:**
Full-width section with linear-gradient(135deg, #7C3AED 0%, #4C1D95 100%) background. Padding: 60px vertical. 4-column grid of stats. Each stat: number in Space Grotesk 700 48px white, label in Inter 14px rgba(255,255,255,0.7) below. Dividers between columns: 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.2).

**FEATURE CARDS GRID:**
Padding: 100px vertical. Background: #0F0A1E. Section title centered: Space Grotesk 600 40px white. Subtitle: Inter 16px #A0AEC0, max-width 600px centered. 3-column grid below with 24px gap. Each card: background #1A1030, border 1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.2), border-radius 16px, padding 32px. Icon at top (40px, colored #7C3AED or #10B981). Title: Space Grotesk 600 20px white. Description: Inter 14px #A0AEC0. Hover state: border-color rgba(124,58,237,0.6), box-shadow 0 8px 32px rgba(124,58,237,0.15), transform translateY(-4px), transition 0.3s ease.

**INTEGRATION/PARTNER CARDS:**
Horizontal scrollable row or 4-column grid. Cards with brand-colored backgrounds (varied: purple, green, dark). Each card: 200x200px, border-radius 20px, centered logo/icon, company name below in Inter 500 14px white. Slight rotation on some cards for visual dynamism.

**DEVELOPER/API SECTION:**
Dark background #0A0618. Two columns: left has H2 Space Grotesk 700 40px white, description Inter 16px #A0AEC0, CTA button. Right: code block with monospace font, background #1A1030, border-radius 12px, syntax highlighting using #10B981 for strings, #7C3AED for keywords, #FFFFFF for base code. Line numbers in #4A5568.

**INFRASTRUCTURE/RELIABILITY SECTION:**
Background: subtle dot-grid pattern on #0F0A1E. Centered layout. H2 Space Grotesk 600 40px white. 3-column feature list with icons. Below: animated or static uptime/performance metrics bar. Accent color #10B981 for positive metrics.

**BLOG/NEWS FEED:**
Padding: 80px vertical. Section label + H2 left-aligned. Horizontal card row: 3 cards, each with thumbnail image (border-radius 12px), category pill, title Space Grotesk 600 18px white, excerpt Inter 14px #A0AEC0, date/author line. Card background: #1A1030, border-radius 16px, overflow hidden.

**FOOTER:**
Background: #080514. Padding: 80px top, 40px bottom. Top row: logo left + tagline. Below: 5-column link grid — Company, Products, Developers, Resources, Legal. Column headers: Space Grotesk 600 14px white. Links: Inter 14px #A0AEC0, hover #FFFFFF. Bottom bar: divider line rgba(255,255,255,0.08), copyright left Inter 12px #4A5568, social icons right. All transitions 0.2s ease.

559309654113d70ee7ff21fe523e130f.style: Dark mode SaaS with glassmorphism, deep black backgrounds, frosted glass UI panels, subtle border glows, and high-contrast typography. Brand: Nebula AI Solutions with violet-purple primary and emerald green accent.
559309654113d70ee7ff21fe523e130f.layout: Full-width single-page layout. Sticky top navigation, full-width hero section with large heading, horizontal logo marquee strip, alternating two-column feature sections (text left/right with UI mockup panels), changelog section, testimonial cards, and a full-width CTA footer block. Ends with a multi-column site footer.
559309654113d70ee7ff21fe523e130f.typography: Headings: Space Grotesk, bold/extrabold (700–800 weight), large scale (48–72px for hero, 32–40px for section headings). Body: Inter, regular/medium (400–500 weight), 14–16px, muted gray tones. Labels and captions: Inter, 12px, uppercase or sentence case, low-opacity white.

Glass panels draw the eye as interactive UI previews. Testimonial cards use amber/yellow background for maximum contrast break.
559309654113d70ee7ff21fe523e130f.human_readable_prompt:
Build a full-page dark-mode SaaS website for 'Nebula AI Solutions' using the following exact design system:

**Global Styles:**
- Background: #0A0A0A (near-black, pure dark)
- Primary accent: #7C3AED (violet-purple) used for CTA buttons, glows, highlights
- Secondary accent: #10B981 (emerald green) used for status dots, data highlights, secondary labels
- Heading font: 'Space Grotesk', bold to extrabold (700–800)
- Body font: 'Inter', regular to medium (400–500)
- Base text color: #FFFFFF for headings, #A1A1AA for body/muted text
- Border color on glass cards: rgba(255,255,255,0.08) to rgba(255,255,255,0.12)

**Navigation (Sticky):**
- Full-width sticky nav, ~60px height
- Background: rgba(10,10,10,0.85) with backdrop-filter: blur(12px)
- Logo left-aligned: 'Nebula AI Solutions' in Space Grotesk semibold white
- Center nav links: Inter 14px, #A1A1AA, hover to white
- Right side: ghost outline button + filled #7C3AED pill CTA button, both ~36px height, 14px Inter medium, border-radius: 9999px

**Hero Section:**
- Full-width, padding-top: 100px, padding-bottom: 80px, centered text
- H1: Space Grotesk 700, 64–72px, white, max-width 700px, line-height 1.1
- Subheading: Inter 400, 18px, #A1A1AA, max-width 560px, margin-top 20px
- CTA row: two pill buttons — primary (#7C3AED fill, white text) and ghost (border rgba(255,255,255,0.15), white text), gap 12px, margin-top 36px
- Below CTA: a large glassmorphism UI mockup panel — background rgba(255,255,255,0.04), border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08), border-radius 16px, backdrop-filter blur(20px), padding 24px, box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(124,58,237,0.15)

**Logo Marquee Strip:**
- Full-width horizontal scrolling strip, ~48px tall, background #111111
- Contains 8–10 partner/integration logos in muted white (~40% opacity)
- Infinite CSS scroll animation, no gaps

**Feature Sections (6 total, alternating layout):**
- Each section: padding 100px 0, max-width 1200px, centered, display grid 2 columns, gap 80px
- Odd sections: text left, mockup right. Even sections: mockup left, text right
- Text column: eyebrow label in #10B981 Inter 12px uppercase, H2 in Space Grotesk 700 36–40px white, body in Inter 16px #A1A1AA, margin-top 16px each
- Mockup column: glassmorphism card — background rgba(255,255,255,0.03), border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08), border-radius 16px, backdrop-filter blur(16px), padding 24px, inner UI elements (lists, avatars, code blocks, charts) rendered in dark sub-panels
- Subtle violet glow behind mockup: box-shadow 0 0 80px rgba(124,58,237,0.12)

**Code Block Panel (Feature 5):**
- Dark panel background #0D0D0D, border-radius 12px, padding 20px
- Syntax highlighting: strings in #10B981, keywords in #7C3AED, comments in #555555, base text #E5E5E5
- Monospace font (JetBrains Mono or Fira Code), 13px

**Data Visualization Panel (Feature 6):**
- Bar chart with bars colored in gradient from #7C3AED to #10B981
- Background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03), border-radius 12px
- Axis labels in Inter 11px #555555

**Changelog Section:**
- Padding 80px 0, max-width 900px centered
- H2 Space Grotesk 700 40px white
- List of changelog entries: date in #10B981 Inter 12px, title in Inter 500 16px white, description in Inter 400 14px #A1A1AA
- Divider lines: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)

**Testimonials:**
- Two-column card grid
- Card 1: background #F5C518 (amber/yellow), text #0A0A0A, border-radius 16px, padding 32px — high contrast break
- Card 2: glassmorphism dark card matching feature panel style
- Quote text: Inter 500 18px, attribution: Inter 400 14px with avatar

**CTA Section:**
- Full-width, padding 120px 0, centered
- H2: Space Grotesk 800 56px white, two lines
- Two pill buttons below: primary #7C3AED and ghost outline
- Subtle radial gradient background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(124,58,237,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%)

**Footer:**
- Background #0A0A0A, padding 60px 0
- 5-column grid: brand column left (logo + tagline + social icons), then 4 link columns
- Link text: Inter 14px #A1A1AA, hover white
- Column headers: Inter 500 12px uppercase #555555
- Bottom bar: 1px border-top rgba(255,255,255,0.06), copyright Inter 12px #555555

**Glassmorphism System:**
- All cards: background rgba(255,255,255,0.03–0.05), border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08–0.12), backdrop-filter blur(16–24px), border-radius 12–16px
- Hover state: border-color rgba(124,58,237,0.4), box-shadow 0 0 30px rgba(124,58,237,0.2)
- Transition: all 0.3s ease

b64d808bcf3e27a2533c7fad72c9ca25.style: Modern minimal SaaS, dark mode, bold typographic-led design with high contrast sections and editorial layout
b64d808bcf3e27a2533c7fad72c9ca25.layout: Full-width single column, centered content blocks, alternating text-left/media-right sections, full-width showcase grids, sticky navigation, generous vertical rhythm
b64d808bcf3e27a2533c7fad72c9ca25.typography: Space Grotesk for all headings — extremely large, bold (700-800 weight), tight line-height; Inter for body copy — regular 400 weight, small size (~14-16px), muted contrast; Strong typographic hierarchy with hero headlines dominating viewport
sections_detected: Hero with bold headline + media grid
Feature highlight — Create, collaborate, go live
Bold closing CTA — Design bold. Launch fast.
uiPatterns: Sticky top navigation bar with logo left, links center, CTA right
Oversized bold hero headline (3-4 words per line, stacked)
Masonry/grid media collage in hero
Full-bleed dark section backgrounds (#0A0A0A, #111111)
Left-aligned section headlines with right-side UI screenshots
Dashboard/analytics UI mockups embedded in sections
Pill-shaped CTA buttons
Logo marquee / social proof strip
Card grid for community resources/templates
Large closing statement headline centered
Dense multi-column footer with categorized links
b64d808bcf3e27a2533c7fad72c9ca25.spacing: Very generous vertical section padding (~80-120px between sections), tight internal component spacing, large typographic breathing room around headlines, consistent 24-32px grid gutters
b64d808bcf3e27a2533c7fad72c9ca25.visualHierarchy: Typography-first hierarchy — massive headline weights draw immediate attention, followed by subtext, then UI visuals; CTAs use #7C3AED pill buttons as accent anchors; #10B981 used for highlights, badges, or active states
b64d808bcf3e27a2533c7fad72c9ca25.human_readable_prompt:
Build a full-page dark-mode SaaS website for 'Nebula AI Solutions' using the following precise design system:

**GLOBAL STYLES:**
Background: #0A0A0A (near-black). All sections use full-width dark backgrounds alternating between #0A0A0A and #111111 for subtle section separation. No borders between sections — depth is created through background tone shifts only. Border-radius on cards: 12px. Consistent box-shadow: 0 4px 32px rgba(124,58,237,0.08).

**TYPOGRAPHY:**
Heading font: 'Space Grotesk' (Google Fonts), weights 700-800. Body font: 'Inter', weight 400. Hero headline: 64-80px, font-weight 800, line-height 1.05, letter-spacing -0.03em, color #FFFFFF. Section headlines: 40-52px, font-weight 700, line-height 1.1, color #FFFFFF. Subheadings: 20-24px, font-weight 600, color #E5E7EB. Body text: 14-16px, font-weight 400, color #9CA3AF. All headlines should feel editorial and dominant — this is a typography-first design.

**COLOR SYSTEM:**
Primary: #7C3AED (violet) — used for CTA buttons, active states, highlights, gradient accents. Secondary: #10B981 (emerald green) — used for badges, success states, secondary CTAs, hover accents. Text primary: #FFFFFF. Text muted: #9CA3AF. Surface cards: #161616 or #1A1A1A.

**NAVIGATION:**
Sticky top nav, full-width, background #0A0A0A with subtle bottom border rgba(255,255,255,0.06). Logo 'Nebula AI Solutions' on the left in Space Grotesk 600 weight, white. Center: horizontal nav links in Inter 14px, color #9CA3AF, hover color #FFFFFF. Right: pill CTA button — background #7C3AED, text white, padding 10px 20px, border-radius 999px, font Inter 14px 500 weight.

**HERO SECTION:**
Full-width, min-height 90vh, dark background. Left-aligned or centered text block. Headline: 'Build smarter. Scale faster.' in Space Grotesk 800, 72px, white, stacked two lines, tight line-height 1.0. Below headline: 2-line subtext in Inter 16px, color #9CA3AF. Two CTA buttons side by side: primary pill (#7C3AED background, white text) and secondary ghost pill (border 1px solid #7C3AED, transparent background, #7C3AED text). Right side or below: a masonry-style collage grid of 6-8 product/UI preview cards with rounded corners, slight drop shadows, showcasing diverse visual content (dashboards, brand assets, mockups).

**FEATURE SECTIONS (3-4 alternating blocks):**
Each section: 100px vertical padding. Left column: section label in #10B981 uppercase Inter 12px tracking-widest, then large headline 44px Space Grotesk 700 white, then body paragraph Inter 16px #9CA3AF, then optional pill CTA. Right column: UI screenshot or product mockup in a dark card container (#161616 background, 12px radius, subtle violet glow border rgba(124,58,237,0.2)). Alternate left/right layout per section. Section titles examples: 'Create, collaborate, and go live', 'Scale without switching tools', 'Powering ambitious teams worldwide'.

**DASHBOARD/UI MOCKUP BLOCKS:**
Full-width or contained sections showing embedded product UI — analytics charts, overview panels, team dashboards. Use dark card surfaces #1A1A1A, inner elements with #7C3AED accent lines on charts, #10B981 for positive metrics. Subtle grid lines in rgba(255,255,255,0.04).

**SOCIAL PROOF STRIP:**
Full-width horizontal marquee of company logos, grayscale, opacity 0.5, on #111111 background. 60px vertical padding.

**CTA SECTION (mid-page):**
Centered layout, 120px padding. Headline 48px Space Grotesk 700 white. Subtext Inter 16px #9CA3AF. Two pill buttons: primary #7C3AED and secondary #10B981.

**COMMUNITY/RESOURCES GRID:**
Section headline left-aligned. Below: 4-column card grid. Each card: #161616 background, 12px radius, image thumbnail top, title Space Grotesk 600 16px white, tag pill in #10B981 or #7C3AED. Hover: subtle violet border glow.

**CLOSING CTA SECTION:**
Full-width, centered. Giant headline: 'Design bold. Launch fast.' in Space Grotesk 800, 64-72px, white. Below: two pill buttons. Background: subtle radial gradient from #7C3AED at 5% opacity at center, fading to #0A0A0A.

**FOOTER:**
Dark #0A0A0A background, top border rgba(255,255,255,0.06). 5-column layout: logo + tagline left, then 4 link category columns (Product, Resources, Company, Legal). Link text Inter 14px #6B7280, hover #FFFFFF. Bottom bar: copyright left, social icons right. 60px vertical padding.
